query.query_string: Cabergoline AND multiple fibroadenoma of the breast

data.query: Cabergoline AND multiple fibroadenoma of the breast

results.title: Recurrent Acromegaly in a Patient With a CHEK2 Mutation.
results.abstract: CHEK2 is a cell-cycle checkpoint kinase and is part of the ATM-CHEK2-p53 cascade, which is protective against carcinogenesis. We describe a germline CHEK2 mutation in a patient with acromegaly and other tumors.
